parameters.query: SELECT value FROM system_config WHERE key = 'architect_email'

WITH stuck AS (
  SELECT qc.id, qc.project_id, qc.phase_key, qc.status,
         qc.generated_at, qc.updated_at, qc.notes,
         EXTRACT(DAY FROM now() - qc.generated_at)::int AS days_open,
         EXTRACT(DAY FROM now() - qc.updated_at)::int AS days_no_progress,
         (SELECT count(*) FROM jsonb_array_elements(qc.items) it WHERE it->>'status'='pass')    AS passed,
         (SELECT count(*) FROM jsonb_array_elements(qc.items) it WHERE it->>'status'='fail')    AS failed,
         (SELECT count(*) FROM jsonb_array_elements(qc.items) it WHERE it->>'status'='pending') AS pending,
         (SELECT count(*) FROM jsonb_array_elements(qc.items) it WHERE it->>'status'='skip')    AS skipped,
         (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id', it->>'id', 'label', it->>'label', 'comment', it->>'comment'))
            FROM jsonb_array_elements(qc.items) it WHERE it->>'status'='fail') AS fail_items,
         p.name AS project_name
  FROM qc_checks qc
  JOIN projects p ON p.id = qc.project_id
  WHERE qc.status IN ('open','in_progress','blocked')
    AND (
      (qc.status = 'blocked' AND qc.updated_at < now() - INTERVAL '3 days') OR
      (qc.status IN ('open','in_progress') AND qc.generated_at < now() - INTERVAL '7 days')
    )
)
SELECT json_agg(stuck.* ORDER BY days_no_progress DESC NULLS LAST, days_open DESC) AS rows,
       count(*) AS stuck_count
  FROM stuck;
